description:
Overview
Hearing aids are precision electronic products that require strict use. Because of the inevitable contamination of sweat and wax in daily use, bacteria and viruses are easy to breed and can be harmful to human health. Therefore, drying and cleaning the hearing aids are especially necessary. 
The electronic drying case is specially designed to dry hearing aids and other pint-sized sophisticated electronic products and prevents high-grade electronics from being damaged by the impact of moisture.
This product sticks the heat generation element on an aluminum plate, and its center spacer separates the object which needs to be dried from the heat-conducting air in the case. This can avoid damage to the object due to accidental excessive heat. 
Forced convection air will circulate through the ventilation slots and rid your device of moisture.
If humidity is particularly high or there is excess perspiration, simply use the longer 4-hour drying setting.

Specification
Material: ABS
Features: Constant temperature dehumidification/timing design: 4H
Switch: One-touch touch switch
Temperature: PTC automatic con
Color: White


Package Content
1 * Hearing Aid Dryer Case
